name: fusionauth-docs-mcp
description: FusionAuth Documentation MCP server - access identity and authentication documentation.

metadata.short_description: Access FusionAuth identity and authentication documentation
metadata.mesh_description: Provides access to FusionAuth documentation. Enables users to retrieve and explore documentation content for the FusionAuth identity platform. Covers authentication, authorization, user management, single sign-on, and multi-factor authentication topics. Perfect for developers integrating FusionAuth into their applications and needing quick access to implementation guides and API references.
